title: ConnectionScriptsOAuth2
description: Custom scripts to transform user profile data or modify OAuth2 flow behavior

fetchUserProfile.description: Custom JavaScript function to retrieve and transform user profile data from the identity provider. Called with the access token and token exchange response. Must return a user profile object. Executed in a sandboxed environment. If not provided, an empty profile object is used.

getLogoutUrl.description: Custom JavaScript function to dynamically construct the logout URL for the identity provider. Called with the request query parameters and must invoke a callback with the logout URL. Only used if 'logoutUrl' is not configured. Executed in a sandboxed environment.
